summary:
Claim: Strain is defined as a deformation caused by excessive mechanical stress leading to tissue damage.  
Evidence: - It involves actual physical stretching or tearing of tissues (e.g., muscle or ligament), not just external force. - Clinically observed as measurable elongation or rupture under load.  
Answer: B

agent2 (Round 2 summarized): Claim: Strain is defined as a deformation caused by excessive mechanical stress leading to tissue damage.  
Evidence: - It involves actual physical stretching or tearing of tissues (e.g., muscle or ligament), not just external force. - Clinically observed as measurable elongation or rupture under load.  
Answer: B. Answer choice: C
